subject: CN=observe1.yourlab.local
note: 2.16.840.1.101.3.4.3.18 (ML-DSA-65) is encoded as nested ASN.1 inside the altSignatureAlgorithm (2.5.29.73) extension value, not as a top-level OID. All three 2.5.29.7x OIDs plus subjectAltPublicKeyInfo (2.5.29.72) are present because cert was issued with --altkeyalg ML-DSA-65 --altsigalg ML-DSA-65.
